markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content feedback, process, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Accuracy:** Articles contain inaccurate generalizations (e.g., about "technical assessments"). GrowthX will update writing guidelines to ensure greater precision.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [**New Content Format:** All articles will now include a "TLDR" summary at the top to improve user experience and potentially boost LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**FAQ Enhancement:** FAQs will expand to a minimum of 5 questions, using Alex's Gong transcripts to source real customer inquiries.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Reporting Transition:** Reporting will shift from a temporary Looker dashboard to a more robust, in-house analytics solution launching in \~1 month.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

## Topics

### Content Feedback & Accuracy

  - [Max's review of 7 articles revealed inaccuracies from overly broad generalizations.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [**Example:** The "technical assessment" article incorrectly states it fixes a "screening bottleneck."](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is only true for specific assessment types, not the entire category.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [GrowthX will update writing guidelines to ensure more precise, nuanced claims.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Content Format & Structure

  - [**TLDRs:** All articles will now include a "TLDR" (Too Long; Didn't Read) summary at the top.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To immediately show relevance to the reader and potentially improve LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [**FAQs:** The FAQ section will expand to a minimum of 5 questions.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To provide more comprehensive answers to common search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Source:** Alex's Gong transcripts will be used to ensure FAQs reflect real customer questions.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Content Workflow & Cadence

  - [**Process:** Max provides feedback in the content doc → GrowthX makes edits → A publishing ticket is created.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [**Cadence:** The goal is to publish 2–3 articles weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**Buffer:** GrowthX will maintain a 2–3 article buffer to ensure consistent publishing, even during team absences.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Reporting & Analytics

  - [**Current State:** A temporary Looker dashboard is being finalized this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Transition:** Reporting will move to a more robust, in-house analytics dashboard launching in \~1 month.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [**Cadence:** Monthly deep-dive meetings are proposed to review performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### Imagery & Branding

  - [**Published Posts:** GrowthX will update all imagery for posts they created, using a simple workflow rerun.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Unpublished Posts:** Alex's team will recolor imagery for any posts created externally.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Max:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Complete feedback on the remaining 4 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Share the Slack link to Gong transcript analysis for FAQ ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Implement feedback on the 3 reviewed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines to include TLDRs and ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [Expand FAQs to a minimum of 5 questions per article.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [Finalize the Looker dashboard for presentation this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Lc7yAYzuZx92zreFosf9Pqhbh3T6XdDA?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
